name: webrtc-demo
description: Simple WebRTC sender/receiver demo with manual signaling

scripts.start: npm run sender & npm run receiver
scripts.gen:cert: mkdir -p certs && openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:2048 -nodes -keyout certs/localhost-key.pem -out certs/localhost-cert.pem -days 365 -subj '/CN=localhost'
scripts.start:https: npm run sender:https & npm run receiver:https
